title: Nezs Client Side BTE Pack
description:
A modpack for use on build the earth servers with the goals of subtly improving graphics and providing a variety of tools for builders to use.

Works on all the 1.20.1 BTE servers and contains many extra mods to improve game performance.
body:
A modpack for use on build the earth servers with the goals of subtly improving graphics and providing a variety of tools for builders to use.

Works on all the 1.20.1 BTE servers and contains many extra mods to improve game performance.

Reccomended to be paired with the pre configured complementary unbound shader, although both shaders and distant horizons may be disabled to increase the framerate.

Controls:
- g = Open gender menu
- i = Open RGB colour picker
- b = Open build guide
- m = Open map
- Numpad 4 = Orthographic camera view
- Numpad + = Orthographic zoom in
- Numpad - = Orthographic zoom out
- Numpad * = Fix/unfix orthographic view
